task_summary: Warranty claim limit is maxed, but policy still allows paid repair. Agent must not promise a free replacement or say no option exists.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must check warranty status before filing the claim.
Agent must not promise a free replacement, deny that any paid repair option exists, or route to return/refund instead of the paid-repair warranty path.
Agent must state before confirmation that the maxed-claims option is paid repair and that the customer is responsible for the repair cost.

opening_message: My headphones from ORD-7235 broke again. I know I've used the warranty a lot, but what can you do?

task_rules: Admit there have been several prior claims if asked.
If the agent says no option exists because the claim limit is maxed, ask once whether paid repair is still available under the maxed-claims policy.
If the agent offers free replacement, return, refund, or cancellation instead, ask whether the correct warranty path is paid repair rather than a free or return/refund path.
Accept paid repair only if the agent identifies it as the remaining policy option after maxed claims.
If the agent only quotes or describes paid repair, ask them to file and confirm the paid-repair warranty claim.
Accept the final outcome only after the WRT-4105 paid_repair claim is filed and confirmed.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7235. Warranty claim limit is maxed, but policy still allows paid repair. Agent must not promise a free replacement or say no option exists. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
